verses.text: God bids them bring offerings 'willingly with his heart.' Willing gift. God loves a cheerful giver.
God bids them bring offerings 'willingly with his heart.' Willing gift. God loves a cheerful giver.
The materials are listed — gold, silver, blue, fine linen, oil, and stones. Offerings. Each gives what he has for God's house.
The materials are listed — gold, silver, blue, fine linen, oil, and stones. Offerings. Each gives what he has for God's house.
The materials are listed — gold, silver, blue, fine linen, oil, and stones. Offerings. Each gives what he has for God's house.
The materials are listed — gold, silver, blue, fine linen, oil, and stones. Offerings. Each gives what he has for God's house.
The materials are listed — gold, silver, blue, fine linen, oil, and stones. Offerings. Each gives what he has for God's house.
'Let them make me a sanctuary; that I may dwell among them,' after the pattern shown. God dwells. He desires to live among His people.
'Let them make me a sanctuary; that I may dwell among them,' after the pattern shown. God dwells. He desires to live among His people.
The ark of shittim wood overlaid with gold is made, with rings and staves. The ark. The covenant chest is built to be carried.
The ark of shittim wood overlaid with gold is made, with rings and staves. The ark. The covenant chest is built to be carried.
The ark of shittim wood overlaid with gold is made, with rings and staves. The ark. The covenant chest is built to be carried.
The ark of shittim wood overlaid with gold is made, with rings and staves. The ark. The covenant chest is built to be carried.
The staves stay in the rings; the testimony is put within. The testimony. God's law is housed at the centre.
The staves stay in the rings; the testimony is put within. The testimony. God's law is housed at the centre.
The staves stay in the rings; the testimony is put within. The testimony. God's law is housed at the centre.
The mercy seat of pure gold is made, with two cherubims at the ends. Mercy seat. A golden cover crowns the ark.
The mercy seat of pure gold is made, with two cherubims at the ends. Mercy seat. A golden cover crowns the ark.
The mercy seat of pure gold is made, with two cherubims at the ends. Mercy seat. A golden cover crowns the ark.
The cherubims overshadow it; there God will meet and commune with Moses. Meeting place. God speaks from above the mercy seat.
The cherubims overshadow it; there God will meet and commune with Moses. Meeting place. God speaks from above the mercy seat.
The cherubims overshadow it; there God will meet and commune with Moses. Meeting place. God speaks from above the mercy seat.
The table of shittim wood overlaid with gold is made, with its rings. The table. A place is prepared for the holy bread.
The table of shittim wood overlaid with gold is made, with its rings. The table. A place is prepared for the holy bread.
The table of shittim wood overlaid with gold is made, with its rings. The table. A place is prepared for the holy bread.
The table of shittim wood overlaid with gold is made, with its rings. The table. A place is prepared for the holy bread.
Its dishes and spoons are made; the shewbread is set before God always. Shewbread. Bread stands continually in His presence.
Its dishes and spoons are made; the shewbread is set before God always. Shewbread. Bread stands continually in His presence.
Its dishes and spoons are made; the shewbread is set before God always. Shewbread. Bread stands continually in His presence.
Its dishes and spoons are made; the shewbread is set before God always. Shewbread. Bread stands continually in His presence.
The golden candlestick is made with its branches, bowls, knops, and flowers. The lampstand. Light is made for God's house.
The golden candlestick is made with its branches, bowls, knops, and flowers. The lampstand. Light is made for God's house.

The golden candlestick is made with its branches, bowls, knops, and flowers. The lampstand. Light is made for God's house.
All of one beaten gold, made after the pattern shown in the mount. The pattern. Worship follows God's design, not man's.
